prompt_text:
### Demographics: 64-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Major Depressive Disorder
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 100.6 kg; Height 183.7 cm; BMI 29.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 144/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.0%; 9 months ago 9.0%; 6 months ago 9.5%; 3 months ago 9.8%; current 10.0%), FPG (12 months ago 232mg/dL; 9 months ago 216mg/dL; 6 months ago 269mg/dL; 3 months ago 279mg/dL; current 216mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 99.8kg; 9 months ago 102.2kg; 6 months ago 97.1kg; 3 months ago 97.9kg; current 100.6kg), Height (12 months ago 183.7cm; 9 months ago 183.7cm; 6 months ago 183.7cm; 3 months ago 183.7cm; current 183.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 29.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 139mmHg; 9 months ago 141mmHg; 6 months ago 142mmHg; 3 months ago 144mmHg; current 144mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 85mmHg; 9 months ago 85mmHg; 6 months ago 84mmHg; 3 months ago 85mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 108U/L; 9 months ago 115U/L; 6 months ago 111U/L; 3 months ago 111U/L; current 113U/L), AST (12 months ago 77U/L; 9 months ago 75U/L; 6 months ago 75U/L; 3 months ago 77U/L; current 79U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.4mg/dL; current 1.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 14mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 9.0mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 9.8mL/min/1.73m²; current 7mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 593mg/g; 9 months ago 885mg/g; 6 months ago 691mg/g; 3 months ago 1045mg/g; current 880mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 99mg/dL; 9 months ago 101mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 101mg/dL; current 97mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 53mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 122mg/dL; 9 months ago 135mg/dL; 6 months ago 134mg/dL; 3 months ago 138mg/dL; current 127mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 10.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
